helper.sceneDesc: Explore the three-dimensional environment using standard navigation commands:
helper.tip: 💡 Tip: If you get lost while moving the scene, you can always use the camera button to start over!
helper.interactDesc: Certain elements within the scene react to your actions. Hover your cursor over the environment to discover points of interest:
helper.interactOutlineDesc: When an object displays a glowing highlighted border, it indicates it is interactive and can be clicked to trigger events.
helper.bugDesc: This project is open source. If something isn't working as expected, open an Issue detailing the problem in the official repository.
